diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,167 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/hono, src/helper/hono-base, src/helper/types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating app factories and handler factories with multiple signatures (x1 to x10) and custom middleware.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/request, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper for getting matched routes and path information from context during request handling.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSEvents, WSContext, WSReadyState, SendOptions, WebSocketHelperDefineHandler, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper with event handling support, providing WSContext for sending messages and control operations.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: imports src/helper/utils/cookie → exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/context, src/helper/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie management helper for getting, setting, generating, and deleting signed/unsigned cookies with prefix support.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: imports src/helper/client → exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/client, src/helper/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper for creating test clients from Hono apps, wrapping hc with custom fetch using app.request.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/context
+- Safe summary: Runtime adapter helper for detecting environment (Node, Deno, Bun, Cloudflare Workers, etc.) and accessing bindings.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: imports src/helper/html, src/helper/jsx, ./css/common → exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/helper/jsx, src/helper/css/common
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for server-rendered HTML with class names, styles, and view transitions, supports async class names.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, toHash, minify, buildStyleString
+- Reads as: exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index, src/helper/jsx/dom
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities for generating class names, building style strings from template literals, minifying CSS, and CSS-in-JS operations.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, buildRequestInitFromRequest, preprocessRequestInit
+- Reads as: imports src/helper/http-exception, src/helper/utils/headers → exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/http-exception, src/helper/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests via fetch with RFC 9110 compliant header stripping and custom fetch support.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: imports src/helper/hono, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/color, src/helper/utils/handler → exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/hono, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/color, src/helper/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Development helper for displaying app routes and inspecting route data with optional colorization and verbosity.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper for building escaped HTML strings with template literals and callback support.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: re-exports from ./ssg, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: re-exports ./ssg and ./middleware → re-exports from ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper re-export index; main SSG is in ssg.ts, middleware in middleware.ts, plugins include defaultPlugin and redirectPlugin.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultExtensionMap, ToSSGResult, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, SSGPlugin
+- Reads as: imports ./ssg/middleware, ./ssg/utils, ./client/utils, src/helper/utils/concurrent, src/helper/utils/mime → re-exports ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/client/utils, src/helper/utils/concurrent, src/helper/ssg/plugins
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation for server-side static generation including route fetching, content saving, concurrency, and plugin support.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: imports src/helper/hono, src/helper/router, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/handler → exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/hono, src/helper/router, src/helper/types, src/helper/utils/handler, src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path joining, directory name extraction, route filtering for static generation, and dynamic route detection.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGParams, SSGContext, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGDisabledResponse (deprecated)
+- Reads as: imports src/helper/ssg/utils → exports directly
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/utils/handler, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: Middleware for SSG request handling with SSG context, dynamic route parameter generation, and SSG disable/disable flags.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main ex
